name: Rajasthan MSME Loan Scheme (RSMSSB)
administered_by: Rajasthan Small Industries Corporation / Bureau of Investment Promotion, Government of Rajasthan
retrieval_text: The Rajasthan government supports micro and small enterprises through concessional term loans from Rs 1 lakh to Rs 25 lakh at interest rates of 5-8% per annum for manufacturing, services, and trading activities. Collateral-free loans are available under CGTMSE cover for amounts up to Rs 10 lakh. Additional subsidies of 25-35% of project cost are available for SC/ST entrepreneurs, women, and first-generation entrepreneurs. Enterprises must be registered under Udyam and located in Rajasthan. Apply through the Rajasthan Single Window Clearance System or local District Industries Centre.
